notes.loopPattern: Loop Over Tech Stacks (splitInBatches, batchSize=1) has two outputs: index 0 = 'done' (fires once after all 20 stacks processed, feeds Normalize and Dedupe), index 1 = 'loop' (fires per stack, feeds Fetch SERP for Stack -> Accumulate Stack Results -> back into Loop Over Tech Stacks to continue).
notes.accumulation: Raw jobs from every loop iteration are collected in workflow static data (rawJobs array), reset at the start of each run by 'Tech Stacks List', then read and deduped by (link, company) in 'Normalize and Dedupe' once the loop completes.
notes.knownIssue: 'Save to Supabase (job_pool)' has the Supabase apikey hardcoded in headerParameters because the 'Header Auth account' credential in this n8n instance is empty/non-functional (same issue as the Day 2 Fetch-Normalize-Save workflow). Fix the credential and switch back to genericCredentialType/newCredential when possible.
